title: id-translation metaconf
description: Schema for the id-translation `metaconf.toml` file, which controls how configuration files in the same directory are processed. See [the docs](https://id-translation.readthedocs.io/en/stable/documentation/translator-config.html#meta-configuration).

allow_blank.description: Allow blank values for interpolated variables. Default false.

equivalence.description: Determines how equivalence between configuration files is computed (for cache invalidation).

python_version.description: Format for the `python_version` equivalence key, e.g. `{v.major}.{v.minor}.{v.micro}`.

extra_packages.description: Additional packages whose versions affect `ConfigMetadata` equivalence.
